Slime Coated Harpoon  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +5 MANA: +10
WT: 4.7 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 10

WT: 4.7 Size: MEDIUM

Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 175pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50

For all of you that payed 100pp
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2003 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent

It appears that you really did not get a DEAL per sé but instead you just bought it for the regular price. Sorry to burst your bubble =P
▲ Page top
Oh man, I didn't realize what a gift it was!
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2003 at 5:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786470999
25 posts
My Troll Shaman was given one of these last night by another Troll Shaman (friend from online).

I was thinking "Hey! Good weapon to keep my Piercing up till I can run the Epic."

Heh. Wonder if he knows it can be stuck in the ranged slot?
▲ Page top
Bought for 100pp
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2003 at 8:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256328860
11 posts
Just bought this bad boy for my (now) 19th shammy. My piercing skill is getting there (it's around 65 now) after I trained a few points and also used a bloodstained fang from about levels 15-18.

This thing is great! Can anyone describe the damage caps again so I know what to look forward to at 20th level? :)
▲ Page top
got a deal but now penniless
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
i just picked this up for 90pp last night at bazaar. thanks fatazz. i was keeping an eye out for harpoons for my 11 shammy and i had 89p3g8s5c when i saw this one come up. ran to merchant and got ripped off when i sold my bags, bone chips, and everything i had while praying that noone else was looking at that SCH. i got back and nuch to my amazement the guy in front of Fatazz was not buying the Slimey. So i'm back in Butcherblock campin' Gobbies. i'm broke but i'm getting off hits for 21 at a rate of 3 to 2 for what i'm taking. this thing rocks. i would have paid the 300pp for it - just glad i didn't have to.

QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2002 at 6:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570755631
10 posts
I got it for 100PP from a 30 Shaman :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 02 2002 at 4:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I haven't taken the time to go to EC and try and sell my stuff so i'm offering what I have here. I have a Slime Coated Spear and i'm asking around 1k for it and i have a Bloodstained Fang which i'm offering for around 100pp-300pp. I normally play on my druid (Kuolon) and sometimes i play my warrior (Aurwen). I'm on the Fennin Ro server, just drop a tell and i can be most places fast.
Price Dropping
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 8:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761147698
Sage
1,262 posts
Check out the Bogling Chieftan's Spear. 10 dmg/26 DLY and pluses vs poison and disease. Much easier to get than SCH. Drops off a level 30ish MOB in Echo Caverns.

The SCH typically sold for 800p on Bertoxxolous but now my guess is that it will drop substantially.

# Jul 27 2002 at 7:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767388859
78 posts

Indeed, i've just bought one at the bazaar for 250 pp, as well as a Beetle Stinger for a mere 200 pp (I just couldn't believe it :) for my Lizzie shaman WOOT !

Silkoril,
Iksar SHM,
Karana
▲ Page top
RE: Price Dropping
QuoteReply
# May 19 2002 at 10:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757903227
32 posts
This weapon was great for shamans, there's lots better for rogues, and, for warriors, lol. The Bogling Chieftan's Spear is only slightly inferior melee, and, the sv vs p and d are nice, that's at the shammy's primary concern. Its all about the mana, which the Bolgling spear lacks. True, though, its prices are falling, as all prices are. Old items are still being camped and becoming more common, and new and better ones keep popping up! Just my two cents.
▲ Page top
Nice Weapon
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 7:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592253638797
1 post
I got this weapon from a stranger he said i would make more use of it than he would.I must say i am a lvl 21 dwarf rogue.I normally Backstab for 60-70 damage.When i got the Slime coated harpoon i backstab for 90 to 95.
▲ Page top
Great item
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2002 at 1:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591758588779
69 posts
This item is very nice. I have seen many shaman use this still at 45. Its a great item to twink lower shaman and even rogues, beastlords, and warriors(though not many warriors use piercing).

Dmg:dly Is very nice. Fast hits, nice damage, very nice.

Drawback: Price(at current moment in time)
As predicted, the price has skyrocketed(due to the thousands of new beastlords). Pre-lucling, i rember seeing this as low as 300. Now i have seen it as high as 2k(mainly in trades, but still). I am sure that when everyone realizes that beastlors lack in most areas, the price will fall back down.
▲ Page top
Oh, that's why!
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756105511
27 posts
I came here to check on the price, out of curiousity. I have a baby alt on one server that got one of these for free. Then when she got an upgrade, she was lucky she sold it for 400pp. That was a few months ago.

Today on my main server, I saw a guy selling one for 1.5k. I thought surely there can't be THAT much difference in our server economies, since everything else seemed similar. ) Now, I know. Thanks for the info Smartto.
▲ Page top
SCH
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2002 at 5:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775593484
3 posts
I recieved this weapon from a friend, which he bought for 450 plat. I must say it was a GREAT increase to what I had. With 10dmg and only a 25 delay its great. I went from doing 1-6 dmg to 13-20 and doing that damage faster. And that is only at a 'feeble' ranking and at level 11. So I look forward to seeing what it can really do.

Kukansis
Lvl 11 IKS SHA
Prexus

QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 7:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758592260
15 posts
Ok i was one of those people who did a very dumb thing and didnt use much wisdom pts. when u first start yur charcter, and i have only 91 wisdom including having some wisdom items as well. I am a lvl 24 shaman and the low wisdom is really catchin up to me. I need a better weapon(especially with the wisdom and xtra mana.) Although i do have a wraith bone warhammer, and it is 1HB, i would like to get good at piercing. I am on the Zeborox server(not sure how to spell it)and will do anything to get one. I have a Blackened Alloy ******* sword to trade along with my wraith bone warhammer for it. Or i can give u cash, anywayz i need very badly and would much appreciate it if anyone reading this could help me out :)

24th lvl shaman
Bararack Cougerclaw

# Dec 30 2001 at 9:40 AM Rating: Decent

Got this beauty just before Christmas from a fellow Guildie, boy was I pleased best present I got apart from SOL.

▲ Page top
Confirmed: BST can use
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 7:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248353929
7 posts
I saw someone auctioning this in gBay last week for 500pp. Thinking someone would pounce on that deal, I let it go without responding... then 30 seconds later, it was auctioned again. On a whim, I asked the seller if beastlords could use it, and he said yes. I agreed to buy it, thinking that even if he were fibbing, I'd just give it to my shaman alt. Sure enough, when I inspected it in the trade window, there it was... WAR ROG SHM BST. :)

Plat for plat, this has to be the best twink weapon a beastlord can get. Excellent ratio, nice (and important) WIS and mana boost, and conveniently stored in the range slot when you'd rather crush or punch your foes instead of piercing them.

I expect the price on these to go up slightly for awhile, then crash back down again once more Luclin items make it to market.
▲ Page top
How much?
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 6:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771954347
2 posts
Hi,
on the Rallos Zek server I'm currently looking to buy this weapon for my rogue...how much,average,would it go for on this server?
Any answers i would really appreciate.
▲ Page top
slimy
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 10:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769308167
View User Forum
5 posts
I was in a guild tournament and won my slimy and a tomb carver. At the time, I was level 15 and I must say the weapon is quite nice. The slimy has been in my primary since then and I am lvl 38 now. The 10/25 damage is nice for a young rogue and it's a very popular weapon on the Zeb server for rogues. There are better weapons, but those require time and pp which I am working towards. I have seen these go for 500-800pp on the zeb server. The price has come down a bit since I started playing. The price may have come down since there are more in circulation then there used to be.
▲ Page top
Fast, Deadly
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2001 at 10:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248766762
Scholar
81 posts
Wow this thing is FAST! At lvl 15 my warrior hits for 20 constantly and at a very fast rate, I reccomend this highly for any other class that can use it, especially shaman or rogue, I wasn't looking for one, but when you see one of these for 300, you can't pass that deal up =D
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 23 2001 at 10:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This thing rocks!

a freebie too ! kind of !
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 3:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251672291
5 posts
i just got this weapon tonight from a very very kind wonderful 53rd wiz- who needed my tracking skills for a very short time- like less than 10 mins in total ! she gave me this weapon, a ruby and a sapphire necklace for helping her out- (i would have helped her for free anyways !) I had to log to find out how much its worth as somone in my guild said its worth 800pp - !! wow! i am speechless ! thats like 1k for 10 mins ! just when i was feeling merde !! and about to call it a night- thank you Mother Tunare for looking after your lowly Ranger :) so guys and gals - never turn down a strangers request for help- u just never know :)))
▲ Page top
Free
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764209364
6 posts
Ok, you I was a lvl 12 rogue and iI was going to zone in to Cb when a guy comes up to me and ask's if I want a free weapon. Ofcourse I accepted right away. He said that I must donate the weapon I was using at the time to a lesser rogue. Well it turns out he gave me a Slime Coated Harpoon..FOR FREE!! Can you believe my luck. I have ben doing backflips ever since.
▲ Page top
An Old Shaman Stand-By
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2001 at 1:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760164965
Scholar
68 posts
Save up for this and buy it when you can. +5 Wisdom and +10 Mana rocks, and when you find something better, you can slap this sucka in your range slot and keep right on going. And the 10/25 ain't too shabby.

As an update to the above info, Beastlords can also equip this weapon.

▲ Page top
Sweet
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 4:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250767294
7 posts
After using one of these in my range slot on my shaman for the wisdom, my rogue twink got envious of the sweet 10/25 ratio.. Not wanting to give up the weapon to my rogue and lose the wisdom.. i picked one up for her to for 500p (IMO is a great deal for this weapon) At lvl 11 she backstabs for 57 and my skills only at 43 or something.. And I plan on using this weapon for a long time.. Plus it looks badass!

If anyone has an opinion of a 1hs weapon I can use in 2nd hand slot thats comparable to the icepaw war claws or icetooth claws (which are primary only ouch!) around the 500p mark or so.. Please lemme know as I want to get 1hs up as well.. Would love claws in second hand but dont know of any good ones that can go there.

/em pleads and begs for your humble opinion!
▲ Page top
RE: Sweet
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2001 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Check out the Blackened alloy longsword. It is one less damage, and same delay as Icetooth claws (10dmg, 29dly), but either melee, and only weight of 2. Also cheap. I picked one up for about 100pp. Have since seen for less.
